name: Spicy Meatball Soup
recipeIngredient: Yellow sweet corn, drained (11 oz total)
Green onions, tops on (2 tbsp chopped)
Green onions with tops, chopped (1/4 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix ground beef with 11 oz of drained yellow sweet corn and all the meatball ingredients. Form into balls.
2. Place on a cookie sheet and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or until firm.
3. In a 5-quart Dutch oven or stockpot, combine remaining drained corn, soup ingredients, and bring to boil over high heat.
4. Reduce heat to low and carefully add the uncooked meatballs.
5. Simmer uncovered for 45-60 minutes, or until flavors blend and meat is no longer pink.
6. Garnish individual servings with toppings if desired.
